title: Paltonium lanceolatum
taxonomy: Paltonium lanceolatum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Aizoaceae. It is native to South Africa. The classification of Paltonium lanceolatum is as follows: genus - Paltonium, species - lanceolatum, family - Aizoaceae. More specifically, the family Aizoaceae belongs to the order Caryophyllales, subclass Rosidae, class Magnoliopsida, and division Magnoliophyta. Paltonium lanceolatum is further classified as a succulent plant within this classification.
